_publications._publicationTitle: A machine learning classifier trained on cancer transcriptomes detects NF1 inactivation signal in glioblastoma.

_contextSnippet: Two samples (PBH, RIW) had equal or greater NF1 than the positive control, U87-MG + proteasome inhibitors (preventing NF1 degradation)
details: U87-MG + proteasome inhibitors served as positive control, with two GBM samples (PBH, RIW) having equal or greater NF1 than this positive control
